title: Comfort Perfume Creations Passion Bloom Fabric Conditioner Motion-Activated Fragrance Technology 100 Days of Freshness 30 washes (900 ml)
features: Experience Next Level Freshness: Comfort Perfume Creations Passion Bloom Fabric Conditioner provides a superior, multisensory freshness that lingers on your clothes for up to 100 days
Captivating Fragrance: Our laundry conditioner's scent blends the juicy sweetness of mango with the exotic allure of passion flower and frangipani
With Motion-Activated Technology: This washing softener releases its alluring scent with every move, ensuring your clothes stay fresh for longer
Effective in Short and Cold Cycles: Our laundry softener delivers excellent results in various washing conditions
Sustainability: The bottle for this fabric softener contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve)
Tip for Ultimate Freshness: Pour one full cap into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine
description: Product Description Experience next level freshness with Comfort Perfume Creations Passion Bloom Fabric Conditioner, enveloping your clothes in an irresistible scent that lasts for up to 100 days*. This liquid fabric softener features Comfort’s motion-activated technology, releasing bursts of luxurious fragrance with every move to keep your clothes smelling incredibly fresh for longer. This vibrant fragrance blends the juicy, subtle sweetness of mango with the exotic allure of passion flower and frangipani, creating a truly captivating and long-lasting aroma. Our washing softener lets you enjoy perfectly conditioned clothes without any hassle, even in short and cold cycles. How to use: For a sensory delight that captivates the senses, add 1–2 caps per load to the conditioner compartment of your washing machine. Use 30 ml for a 4–5 kg wash load, 60 ml for a 6–7 kg wash load. For perfect results, use with Surf Passion Bloom Laundry Detergent. Our Comfort bottle contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve); please recycle both the bottle and the cap. Indulge in the long-lasting freshness of Comfort Perfume Creations and say hello to next level fresh smelling clothes that spark joy with every wear, transforming your laundry experience into a luxurious escape. *After line drying and storage. Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic Surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Limonene, Linalool, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate. Directions 1. Check dosage recommendation. 2. Add to fabric softener dispenser or washing machine. 3. Wash clothes as usual. Manufacturer Contact Information Comfort, Freepost ADM1000, London, SW1A 2XX Unilever Ireland, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24. See more
